forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 52. West wind around 7 mph.

forecast.name: Sunday
forecast.detailedForecast: Sunny. High near 72, with temperatures falling to around 70 in the afternoon. West northwest wind 3 to 15 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

weather_report:
In the stillness of the early morning, Downtown San Francisco awaits a day kissed by the sun, a prelude to warmth that will envelop the city as the hours unfold. Currently, the air is cool, resting at a gentle 52 degrees, allowing the chill to linger in the shadows. As morning expands, bright rays will soon sweep through the bay, caressing the buildings with a memory of summer as temperatures stretch toward a pleasant 72 degrees, before settling around 70 in the afternoon. The westward winds, playful yet consistent, will dance between 3 to 15 mph, occasionally gusting up to 23 mph, exerting their influence on the sails dotting the bay.

The clarity of the day presents a vision with crisp horizons, free from the usual veil of fog that has temporarily retreated. There lies no trace of the marine layer this morning; instead, the coast showcases an inviting panorama, beckoning locals and visitors alike to embrace the gentle warmth and serenity of the day. It would be wise to dress in layers: a light jacket for the morning chill, transitioning to a more casual attire suitable for a sun-soaked afternoon. A stroll down the Embarcadero could awaken the senses, where one might enjoy the waterfront ambiance, sip coffee from a corner café, or simply let the rhythm of the city resonate through their day. As the sun sets later, the charming contours of the Golden Gate and the city skyline will take on an almost ethereal quality, emphasizing the magic that is quintessentially San Francisco.
